clues: Users are unexpectedly able to access settings that should be blocked by company policy.
The corporate desktop wallpaper that was enforced by Group Policy has disappeared.
Network drive mappings that should be applied at login are not appearing for anyone.
Running 'gpresult /r' on an affected machine shows one or more Group Policy objects failed to apply.
The SYSVOL share on the domain controller contains corrupted policy files from a recent sync failure.
